title: Cut Off Trees for Golf Event

testcases.input: forest = [[1,2,3],[0,0,4],[7,6,5]] Output: 6 Explanation: Following the path above allows you to cut off the trees from shortest to tallest in 6 steps.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: Following the path above allows you to cut off the trees from shortest to tallest in 6 steps.

testcases.input: forest = [[1,2,3],[0,0,0],[7,6,5]] Output: -1 Explanation: The trees in the bottom row cannot be accessed as the middle row is blocked.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: The trees in the bottom row cannot be accessed as the middle row is blocked.

testcases.input: forest = [[2,3,4],[0,0,5],[8,7,6]] Output: 6 Explanation: You can follow the same path as Example 1 to cut off all the trees. Note that you can cut off the first tree at (0, 0) before making any steps.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: You can follow the same path as Example 1 to cut off all the trees. Note that you can cut off the first tree at (0, 0) before making any steps.
